notes: TD-reset 2026-05-21: RTS-historikk arkivert. Loop kjøres nå mot Frontline TD (15 bølger, tower defense). Mål: passiv run overlever ≥5 bølger; aktiv run vinner 40-60% av ganger.

history.mode: passive + auto-upgrade (first card each wave, 1x speed, JS automation v19)
history.notes: BEST NO-HEAL RUN EVER: cleared W1–W13 with only 60 HP total damage (only W4). All combat/income upgrades — Krigsraseri/Berserkergang/Tårnsmed/Sumo-maur/Skarpe mandibler/Tordenstorm/Søsterkull/Mutasjon/Sopp-spore/Maur-på-koffein/Bittesmå maur/Fôrlagre/Glasskanoner — no HP-heal drawn in 13 upgrades. HP map: W1–W3 zero (500), W4 −60 (440), W5–W11 zero (440 — 7 consecutive zero waves!), W12 (4 heavy all-lanes) −120 HP (440→320) — FAVORABLE VARIANCE, W13 (3 heavy all-lanes) ZERO (320→320) — backlog #40 CONFIRMED AGAIN. W14 (12 heavy all-lanes) killed from 320 HP (8 soldiers still alive, ~4 reached base ≈80 HP/heavy). No-heal worst-case confirmed: 320 HP insufficient for W14. Expected with-heal entry ~570–630 HP; estimated W14 damage ~240–400 HP (high variance) → likely 170–390 HP entering W15. Gold 3121 unspent.
history.action: balance (backlog #42): wave 14 reduced 12→9 heavy all-lanes (1 per lane reduction). No-heal worst-case entered W14 with 320 HP and died (8/12 alive, ~4 cleared base ≈80 HP/heavy). With 9 heavy, estimated penetration ~3 units reaching base (~240 HP damage). Goal: passive baseline (with Forsterket tue heal) enters W15 (20 heavy boss) with ≥200 HP so W15 can finally be tested.

history.mode: passive + auto-upgrade (first card each wave, 1x speed, JS automation v18)
history.notes: Heal upgrade drawn (380→750 after W6). HP map: W1-W4 zero (500), W5 -60 (440), W6 -60 (380), heal→750, W7-W8 zero (750), W9 -240 (750→510) — HIGH VARIANCE (6 medium all-lanes), W10 zero (510), W11 zero (510), W12 (4 heavy all-lanes) ZERO (510→510) — variance confirmed, W13 (3 heavy all-lanes) ZERO (510→510) — BACKLOG #40 VALIDATED, W14 (15 heavy all-lanes) killed from 510 HP (9 soldiers still alive, 6 cleared base ≈85 HP/heavy). Backlog #40 goal FULLY MET: entered W14 with 510 HP (≥300 HP target). W12+W13 both zero this run (very favorable RNG). W14 is the clear bottleneck at 15 heavy. W9 (6 medium all-lanes) showed 240 HP damage — concern without heal upgrade.
history.action: balance (backlog #41): wave 14 reduced 15→12 heavy all-lanes (1 per lane reduction). 15 heavy killed from 510 HP (6 reached base ≈85 HP/heavy, 9 still alive). Goal: passive baseline (with Forsterket tue heal) enters W15 (20 heavy boss) with ≥100 HP.

history.mode: passive + auto-upgrade (first card each wave, 1x speed, JS automation v16b)
history.notes: Heal upgrade drawn after W10 (500→750 HP). HP map: W1-W9 zero (500), W10 upgrade heal→750, W10 zero (750), W11 zero (750), W12 (4 heavy all-lanes) -360 HP (750→390) — EXTREME VARIANCE (run 56: 120, run 57: 240, run 58: 360), W13 (4 heavy all-lanes) -240 HP (390→150) — HIGH VARIANCE vs run 57 (0 HP from SAME 390 HP entry), W14 (15 heavy all-lanes) killed from 150 HP (13 soldiers still alive, ~2 heavies cleared base ~75 HP/heavy). Backlog #39 goal NOT MET. Root cause: W12+W13 combined dealt 600 HP from 750 HP base (worst case yet). W13 variance confirmed upgrade-draw dependent: same 4-heavy config, same 390 HP entry, radically different outcome (0 HP run 57 vs 240 HP this run). Gold 3604 unspent.
history.action: balance (backlog #40): wave 13 reduced 4→3 heavy all-lanes (1 per lane reduction). W13 (4 heavy) showed extreme variance (0 HP run 57 vs 240 HP run 58 — same entry HP 390). Must be upgrade-draw dependent on tower DPS. 3 heavy expected worst-case ~120-180 HP. Goal: passive baseline (with Forsterket tue heal) enters W14 (15 heavy all-lanes) with ≥300 HP so W14 leaves ≥100 HP entering W15.

history.mode: passive + auto-upgrade (first card each wave, 1x speed, JS automation v15)
history.notes: HP map: W1-W4 zero (500), Forsterket tue heal drawn → 750, W5 zero (750), W6 -120 HP (750→630), W7-W11 zero (630 maintained 5 consecutive waves), W12 (4 heavy all-lanes) -240 HP (630→390) — HIGH VARIANCE vs run 56 (-120 HP same config), W13 (4 heavy all-lanes) ZERO (390→390) — BACKLOG #38 VALIDATED, W14 (18 heavy all-lanes) killed from 390 HP (12 soldiers still alive, 6 cleared base ≈65 HP/heavy). W12 variance: 120 HP (run 56) vs 240 HP (this run) for same 4-heavy config. Gold 3834 unspent.
history.action: balance (backlog #39): wave 14 reduced 18→15 heavy all-lanes (1 per lane reduction). 18 heavy killed from 390 HP (6 reached base ~65 HP/heavy, 12 still alive). Expected 15-heavy damage: ~200-300 HP. Goal: passive baseline (with Forsterket tue heal) enters W15 (20 heavy all-lanes boss) with ≥100 HP.

history.mode: passive + auto-upgrade (first card each wave, 1x speed, JS automation v13)
history.notes: Heal upgrade drawn (500→750 early). HP map: W1-W3 zero (500→750 via heal), W4 -90 (750→660), W5 -180 (660→480), W6-W11 zero (480 maintained), W12 (4 heavy all-lanes) -120 HP (480→360) — BACKLOG #37 VALIDATED: W12 variance is within expected range (120 HP this run vs 240 HP worst case in run 55; 4-heavy average confirmed ~120 HP). W13 (7 heavy all-lanes) -360 HP dead — all 7 heavies cleared base (ai=0, ~51 HP/heavy). Entered W13 with 360 HP from heal advantage, still lethal. Without-heal worst case: enters W12 at ~230 HP, W12 costs 120 HP → 110 HP entering W13 → dead immediately. W13 (7 heavy) overwhelms even favorable heal runs. Gold 2611 unspent.
history.action: balance (backlog #38): wave 13 reduced 7→4 heavy all-lanes (1 per lane reduction). 7 heavy killed from 360 HP (~51 HP/heavy, all 7 cleared). Expected 4-heavy damage: ~204 HP. Goal: passive baseline (with Forsterket tue heal) enters W14 (18 heavy all-lanes) with ≥100 HP.

history.mode: passive + auto-upgrade (first card each wave, 1x speed, JS automation v3)
history.notes: Backlog #36 goal NOT met (W13 at 7 heavy still lethal). HP map: W1-W3 zero (500), W4 -30 (470), W5 zero (470), W6-W7 combined -60 (410), W8-W11 all zero (410), W12 (5 heavy all-lanes) -240 HP (410→170) — EXTREME VARIANCE vs run 54 (-120 HP same config), W13 (7 heavy all-lanes) -170 HP dead (4 AI soldiers still on lanes). Root cause: W12 variance 120-240 HP (2×) leaves inconsistent W13 entry HP. With 90 HP early damage + 240 HP W12, only 170 HP entering W13 vs backlog #36's expected 380 HP. W13 (7 heavy): 3 heavies reached base (~57 HP/heavy), 4 still on lanes when dead. Gold 2846 unspent.
history.action: balance (backlog #37): wave 12 reduced 5→4 heavy all-lanes (1 per lane reduction). W12 worst-case variance 120-240 HP must be tightened before W13 calibration is meaningful. 4 heavy → expected worst-case ~180 HP. Goal: passive baseline WITHOUT heal enters W13 (7 heavy all-lanes) with ≥230 HP so W13 can be properly tested.

history.mode: passive + auto-upgrade (first card each wave, 1x speed, JS automation v12)
history.notes: BEST PASSIVE RUN YET (no heal upgrade drawn). Zero damage W1-W11 (500 HP maintained through all early/mid waves). Backlog #35 MASSIVELY VALIDATED: entered W12 with 500 HP (goal was ≥150 HP). HP map: W1-W11 zero damage (500), W12 (5 heavy all-lanes) -120 HP (500→380), W13 (10 heavy all-lanes) -380 HP dead. W10 (2 heavy Midt) and W11 (2 heavy all-lanes) both confirmed zero damage — all prior reductions backlog #34+#35 working perfectly. W13 is the new bottleneck: 10 heavy all-lanes killed from 380 HP (~38 HP/heavy on average). Backlog #33 goal (enter W14 with ≥100 HP) NOT MET. Gold 1585 unspent.
history.action: balance (backlog #36): wave 13 reduced 10→7 heavy all-lanes (1 per lane reduction, established pattern). 10 heavy killed from 380 HP (~38 HP/unit). 7 heavy × 38 HP/unit ≈ 266 HP expected damage. Worst-case entry at W13 = 500 - 120 (W12) = 380 HP; 380 - 266 = ~114 HP entering W14 (18 heavy). Goal: passive baseline WITHOUT heal enters W14 with ≥100 HP.

history.mode: passive + auto-upgrade (first card each wave, 1x speed, JS automation v11)
history.notes: Backlog #34 PARTIALLY validated: W10 (2 heavy Midt) dealt 120 HP (down from 240 HP worst-case in run 52 — improvement confirmed). But W11 (3 heavy all-lanes = 1 per lane, round-robin) dealt 240 HP — far too high. HP map: W1-W3 zero (500), W4 -30 (470), W5 zero, W6 -60 (410), W7-W9 zero, W10 -120 (290), W11 -240 (50), W12 -50 (dead). Without heal: 500 - 30(W4) - 60(W6) - 120(W10) - 240(W11) = 50 HP entering W12. Backlog #34 goal (enter W12 ≥200 HP without heal) NOT MET. Root cause: each heavy in W11 is attacking base ~2x before towers kill it (80 HP/heavy × 3 = 240 HP). round-robin lane distribution means 1 heavy per lane; high variance from arrival timing at base. Upgrades: Vampyrstikk/Evolusjonshjul/Fôrlagre/Maurkongen/Bittesmå maur/Glasskanoner/Søsterkull/Skarpe mandibler/Mutasjon/Berserkergang/Eksplosjons-rom (all useless for passive). Gold 2812 unspent.
history.action: balance (backlog #35): wave 11 reduced 3→2 heavy all-lanes. W11 (3 heavy = 1/lane) dealt 240 HP (80 HP/heavy avg = 2 base attacks per heavy before towers finish them). Reducing to 2 heavy gives 2 units round-robin across 3 lanes (2 lanes get a heavy). Expected W11 damage: ~80-120 HP instead of ~120-240 HP. Goal: passive baseline WITHOUT heal enters W12 (5 heavy all-lanes) with ≥150 HP.

history.mode: passive + auto-upgrade (first card each wave, 1x speed, JS automation v10)
history.notes: Backlog #33 NOT validated — died at W11 before reaching W13. No heal upgrade drawn this run. HP map: W1-W3 zero damage (500), W4 -60 HP (440), W5 zero (440), W6 -120 HP (320) — 4 medium Nord, W7-W9 zero damage (320), W10 -240 HP (80) — 3 heavy Midt EXTREME VARIANCE (was 60-120 HP in runs 50-51 which had heal). W11 -80 HP → dead — 3 heavy all-lanes. Without Forsterket tue heal, worst-case entry at W10 is only 320 HP (500 - 60 W4 - 120 W6). W10 variance range confirmed: 60-240 HP for same 3 heavy Midt config. High variance source must be eliminated for reliable passive baseline. Gold 2746 unspent.
history.action: balance (backlog #34): wave 10 reduced 3→2 heavy Midt. W10 (3 heavy Midt) showed 240 HP worst-case damage this run — combined with W6 (-120 HP) and W4 (-60 HP), leaves only 80 HP entering W11 without heal. Follows established 1-unit-reduction pattern. Goal: passive baseline WITHOUT heal upgrade survives W10-W11 and enters W12 (5 heavy all-lanes) with ≥200 HP so W13 (10 heavy all-lanes, backlog #33) can finally be validated.

history.mode: passive + auto-upgrade (first card each wave, 1x speed, JS automation v9)
history.notes: Backlog #32 goal NOT met: W13 (13 heavy all-lanes) killed from 510 HP. HP map: W1-W9 zero damage (500→750 via Forsterket tue heal), W10+W11 combined -120 HP (750→630), W12 (5 heavy all-lanes) -120 HP (630→510) — dramatically better than run 50 (-360 HP). W13 (13 heavy all-lanes, reduced from 16) dealt 510 HP — still overwhelms 5 free towers completely. High variance at W12: run 50 took 360 HP, this run only 120 HP (likely upgrade draw difference). W13 reduction 16→13 insufficient: damage scales too fast with all-lanes heavy concentration.
history.action: balance (backlog #33): wave 13 reduced 13→10 heavy all-lanes (1 per lane reduction). 13 heavy killed from 510 HP. Goal: passive baseline (with Forsterket tue heal) enters W14 (18 heavy all-lanes) with ≥100 HP.

history.mode: passive + auto-upgrade (first card each wave, 1x speed, JS automation v9)
history.notes: NEW RECORD: first run to reach wave 13. BACKLOG #31 VALIDATED: W8 (1 heavy Sør) = zero damage. HP map: W1-W9 zero damage (500→750 via Forsterket tue heal after W1), W10 (3 heavy Midt) -120 HP (750→630), W11 (3 heavy all-lanes) -120 HP (630→510), W12 (5 heavy all-lanes) -360 HP (510→150), W13 (16 heavy all-lanes) killed from 150 HP. Backlog #30 goal MET with heal upgrade (150 HP entering W13 ≥ goal of 100 HP). W12 is severe: 5 heavy round-robin across 3 lanes (≈2:2:1) dealt 360 HP — towers cannot kill heavies before they reach base. Without heal: worst-case entry at W12 ≈ 20 HP (dead). Upgrades: Forsterket tue/Sopp-spore/Evolusjonshjul/Maurkongen/Bittesmå maur/Termitt-koloni/Eksplosjons-rom/Skarpe mandibler/Vampyrstikk/Mutasjon/Tårnsmed/Fôrlagre. Gold 2874 unspent.
history.action: balance (backlog #32): wave 13 reduced 16→13 heavy all-lanes (1 per lane reduction). 16 heavy killed from 150 HP. Goal: passive baseline (with Forsterket tue heal) enters W14 (18 heavy all-lanes) with ≥100 HP.

history.mode: passive + auto-upgrade (first card each wave, 1x speed, JS automation v6)
history.notes: REGRESSION: died wave 10 from high W8 variance. W8 (2 heavy Sør) dealt 120 HP (vs 0 HP in run 48). HP map: W1-W4 zero damage (500), W4→W5 -60 (440), W5-W6 zero (440), W6→W7 -120 (320), W7-W8 zero (320), W8→W9 -120 (200), W9-W10 zero (200), W10 (3 heavy Midt) killed from 200 HP. Backlog #30 (W12: 5 heavy) NOT VALIDATED — run died at W10. W8 (2 heavy Sør) is the unresolved source of high variance: 0 HP in runs 47-48, 120 HP this run. W6 also deals 120 HP consistently. W6+W8=-240 HP cascade leaves only 200 HP entering W10, which is lethal. Gold 2334 unspent.
history.action: balance (backlog #31): wave 8 reduced 2→1 heavy Sør. Eliminates W8 as a damage source. Even 1 heavy has some variance, but 2 heavy proved a lethal cascade trigger when combined with W6 (-120 HP). Goal: passive baseline enters W9 consistently with ≥300 HP (only W4+W6 damage remains), enabling clean W10 and W12 validation.

history.mode: passive + auto-upgrade (first card each wave, 1x speed, JS automation v5)
history.notes: BACKLOG #29 VALIDATED — but W12 still lethal. HP map: W1-W4 zero damage (500), W4→W5 -60 (440), W5-W6 zero (440), W6→W7 -120 (320), W7-W9 zero (320), W9→W10 -60 (260), W10-W12 zero (260), W12 (8 heavy all-lanes) killed from 260 HP. Worst-case entry confirmed: 500 - 60 W4 - 120 W6 - 60 W9 = 260 HP entering W12 (no heal upgrade draw). Backlog #28 fully confirmed: W7 (4 medium all) zero damage. Backlog #29 partially confirmed: W12 reduced 11→8 but still kills from 260 HP worst case. Goal from #29 (enter W13 with ≥100 HP) not met. All upgrades useless for passive play (Fôrlagre/Berserkergang/Vepsesverm/Sopp-spore/Slangetunge/Maurganger/Tordenstorm/Selvoppofring/Maurkongen/Evolusjonshjul/Mutasjon). Gold 3350 unspent.
history.action: balance (backlog #30): wave 12 reduced 8→5 heavy all-lanes (1 per lane reduction). 8 heavy killed from 260 HP worst-case. Goal: passive baseline enters W13 (16 heavy all-lanes) with ≥100 HP.

history.mode: passive + auto-upgrade (first card each wave, 1x speed, JS automation v4)
history.notes: BACKLOG #28 CONFIRMED: W7 (4 medium all-lanes) = zero damage. HP map: W1-W7 zero damage (500), W8 (2 heavy Sør) -120 HP (500→380), W9 (6 medium all) zero damage (380), W10 (3 heavy Midt) -120 HP (380→260), W11 (3 heavy all) zero damage (260), W12 (11 heavy all-lanes) killed from 260 HP. Entered W10 with 380 HP (goal ≥200 HP met with 180 HP margin). Backlog #28 fully validated. W12 is the new bottleneck: 11 heavy all-lanes killed from 260 HP (worst-case entry without heal upgrade = 500 - 120 W8 - 120 W10 = 260 HP). Gold 1785 unspent.
history.action: balance (backlog #29): wave 12 reduced 11→8 heavy all-lanes (1 per lane reduction). 11 heavy killed from 260 HP worst-case. Goal: passive baseline enters W13 (16 heavy all-lanes) with ≥100 HP.

history.mode: passive + auto-upgrade (first card each wave, 1x speed, JS automation v4)
history.notes: REGRESSION: died wave 9 — no heal upgrade drawn. HP map: W1-W6 zero damage (500), W7 (5 medium all-lanes) -180 HP (500→320), W8 (2 heavy Sør) -120 HP (320→200), W9 (6 medium all-lanes) killed from 200 HP. Without Forsterket tue heal, W7 cascade leaves too little HP for W8+W9. Backlog #27 (W12: 11 heavy) NOT validated — run died before reaching W12. Confirms extreme variance between heal/no-heal upgrade draws: run 45 WITH heal reached W12 with 690 HP, this run WITHOUT heal died at W9. Gold 2355 unspent.
history.action: balance (backlog #28): wave 7 reduced 5→4 medium all-lanes (1 per lane reduction). W7 dealt 180 HP in worst case — enough to cascade into W8 (-120 HP) + W9 death from 200 HP. Goal: passive baseline survives W7-W9 without heal upgrade, enters W10 with ≥200 HP so W12 (11 heavy) can be properly validated.

history.mode: passive + auto-upgrade (first card each wave, 1x speed, JS automation v3)
history.notes: NEW MILESTONE: first run to reach wave 12! HP map: W1 started at 500 → Forsterket tue upgrade → 750 HP, W4 -60 HP (690), W5-W11 ALL ZERO DAMAGE (690 HP maintained 7 waves!), W12 (14 heavy all-lanes ≈ 5 per lane) -480 HP (690→210), W13 (16 heavy all-lanes) killed from 210 HP. Backlog #26 goal massively exceeded: entered W12 with 690 HP (goal was ≥200 HP). Entered W13 with 210 HP — but W13 immediately lethal. W12 is the new bottleneck: enormous jump from W11 (3 heavy = 1 per lane) to W12 (14 heavy ≈ 5 per lane). Gold 4096 unspent.
history.action: balance (backlog #27): wave 12 reduced 14→11 heavy all-lanes (1 per lane reduction, established pattern). 14 heavy dealt 480 HP from a healthy 690 HP base. Goal: passive baseline reaches W13 (16 heavy all-lanes) with ≥200 HP.

history.mode: passive + auto-upgrade (first card each wave, 1x speed, JS automation v2)
history.notes: HP map: W1-W3 zero damage (500), W4 heal upgrade → 750, W4 -60 (690), W5 -60 (630), W6 -120 (510), W7 zero (510), W8 zero (510), W9 (8 medium all) -180 HP (510→330), W10 (3 heavy Midt) -120 HP (330→210), W11 (6 heavy all-lanes) -210 HP dead. W9 high variance confirmed: 0 HP in run 43 vs 180 HP this run — same wave config (8 medium all). Backlog #25 entry HP goal (≥200 HP into W11) achieved at 210 HP. W11 (6 heavy = 2 per lane) still fully lethal from 210 HP. Gold 2352 unspent.
history.action: balance (backlog #26): wave 11 reduced 6→3 heavy all-lanes (1 per lane reduction, established pattern). Also wave 9 reduced 8→6 medium all-lanes (belt-and-suspenders on W9 high variance: 0-180 HP range). Goal: passive baseline reaches W12 (14 heavy all-lanes) with ≥200 HP.

history.mode: passive + auto-upgrade (first card each wave, 1x speed, JS automation)
history.notes: HP map: W1-W3 zero damage (500), W4 -60 HP (440), W5 zero (440), W6 -120 HP (320), W7 zero (320), W8 -120 HP (200), W9 zero (200), W10 (3 heavy Midt) ZERO DAMAGE ✓ (200→200), W11 (9 heavy all-lanes) killed from 200 HP. Backlog #24 goal achieved: entered W11 with exactly 200 HP regardless of upgrade draw. W11 is the confirmed bottleneck at 9 heavy — killed 380 HP in run 41 and 200 HP this run (consistently lethal). W8 (2 heavy Sør) also dealing consistent 120 HP per run. Gold 2732 unspent.
history.action: balance (backlog #25): wave 11 reduced 9→6 heavy all-lanes. 3-unit reduction (1 per lane) following the established all-lanes pattern. 9 heavy (3 per lane) is consistently lethal — killed from 380 HP (run 41) and 200 HP (run 43). Goal: passive baseline reaches W12 (14 heavy all-lanes) with ≥200 HP.

history.mode: passive + auto-upgrade (first card each wave, 1x speed, JS automation)
history.notes: Reached W11 again (tied milestone). HP map: W1-W6 zero damage (500), W7 start 750 (heal upgrade after W6), W8 (2 heavy Sør) -120 HP (750→630), W9 (8 medium all) zero damage (630), W10 (5 heavy Midt) -480 HP (630→150), W11 (9 heavy all-lanes) killed from 150 HP. W10 is the real bottleneck — 5 heavy Midt took 480 HP vs. only 120 HP in run 41 (same wave config!). High variance confirmed: 120-480 HP range for W10. Without heal upgrade, passive runs enter W10 at ~380 HP and die. Backlog #23 (W11 9 heavy) not meaningfully tested since W10 leaves only 150 HP. Gold 700 unspent.
history.action: balance (backlog #24): wave 10 reduced 5→3 heavy Midt. 2-unit reduction because: (1) 5 heavy dealt 480 HP in worst case (vs 120 in run 41 — extreme variance), (2) without heal upgrade passive runs enter W10 at ~380 HP and die even in best case. Goal: passive baseline enters W11 (9 heavy all-lanes) with ≥200 HP regardless of upgrade draw.

history.mode: passive + auto-upgrade (click first card each wave, 1x speed)
history.notes: FIRST RUN TO REACH WAVE 11 — new milestone. HP map: W1-W9 zero damage (500 HP!), W10 (5 heavy Midt) -120 HP (380), W11 (12 heavy all-lanes) -380 HP dead. Backlog #22 (W10 7→5 heavy Midt) highly effective: W10 only dealt 120 HP vs. 500 HP killed in run 40. W11 is the new bottleneck: 12 heavy all-lanes = 4 per lane, overwhelmed 5 free towers completely from 380 HP. Gold 3296 unspent — passive player still not building towers despite gold nudge UI. Upgrade RNG not tracked this run. W10 reduction goal (enter W11 with ≥200 HP) achieved — 380 HP at W11 entry.
history.action: balance (backlog #23): wave 11 reduced 12→9 heavy all-lanes. 3-unit reduction (1 per lane) because 12 heavy killed 380 HP in one wave — a severe all-lanes spike. Goal: passive baseline reaches W12 (14 heavy all-lanes) with ≥200 HP.

history.mode: passive (no towers, no units)
history.action: balance: wave 3-4 difficulty spike. Changed waves 1-7: waves 1-4 now all 'light' units (was: wave 3 jumped to medium/all). First medium now wave 5 (single lane). First all-medium now wave 7. Removed 2 redundant mid-game medium waves to keep 15 total.

history.mode: passive + auto-upgrade (press 1 each wave, no manual towers/units)
history.notes: HUGE improvement from run 19 (wave 3→8, 99s→270s). passive_survives_5_waves condition NOW MET. Base HP peaked at 750 (heal upgrade). Wave rebalance from run 19 effective.
history.action: feature: free starter Stinger tower at (400,440) — placed automatically at game start. Covers both north and mid lanes within range 200. Helps new players understand tower placement. (backlog item 1)

history.mode: passive + smart upgrade choices (BITTESMÅ MAUR → TORDENSTORM → MAURKONGEN → FORSTERKET TUE → VAMPYRSTIKK)
history.notes: Wave 4 near-death (50 HP), saved by FORSTERKET TUE → 750 HP heal. Wave 6 lethal. Regression from run 20 (wave 8→6) likely due to upgrade sequence and stage timing. Found bug: wave 2 config said lane 0 (Nord) but Nord not open until wave 3 — WaveStartMenu showed wrong lane. Also wave 4 said lane 2 (Sør) but Sør ikke åpen til wave 5. Fixed both.
history.action: feature (backlog #2): wave preview threat badges on lane portals. Pulsing red ring + ant-icon badge on portal button when next wave targets that lane. Also fixed wave config: wave 2 lane 0→1 (Midt), wave 4 lane 2→0 (Nord, which opens at wave 3).

history.mode: passive + auto-upgrade (click first card each wave, no manual towers/units, only free starter Stinger)
history.notes: HP progression: 500→410 (w1) →750 heal→660 (w2) →480 (w3) →270 (w4) →0 (w5). Unlucky upgrade draw — Vampyrstikk+Vepsesverm useless passively. Single Stinger tower kills ~3-4 medium units but 3 slip through wave 5. High variance runs (wave 5-8) due to upgrade RNG. Confirmed: the free starter tower is the only active defense in passive runs.
history.action: feature (backlog #3): tower sell button — right-click a placed tower refunds 50% of builtCost. builtCost stored on tower data at placement time. Free starter tower builtCost=0 so no refund. VFX gold float + orange ripple on sell.

history.mode: passive + auto-upgrade (first card each wave, no manual towers/units)
history.notes: Upgrades taken: Maurganger (teleport 35% in), Maurefeber (+30% speed), Selvoppofring (death-heal), Forsterket tue (+250 HP, healed to 750). Died wave 5. Metrics showed state=lost with baseHp=750 — snapshot captured right after FORSTERKET TUE heal, before wave 5 damage. Consistent with prior runs: passive play loses at wave 5-8.
history.action: feature (backlog #4): boss visual indicator — WaveStartMenu shows red pulsing '⚠ BOSS-BØLGE' eyebrow + red card border + red start button for boss waves. CountdownOverlay shows red numbers + red eyebrow for boss countdown. Normal wave UI unchanged.

history.mode: passive + auto-upgrade (first card each wave, no manual towers/units)
history.notes: Base HP: 500→440 (w1)→320 (w2)→200 (w3)→0 (w4). Passive play consistently loses wave 4-5. Found bug: upgrade-modal rendered on top of game-over overlay (UpgradeChoiceModal checked !choice but not s.state). Also observed: data-ai-soldiers shows stale '1' in metrics during upgradeChoice phase — not a game bug but a metrics snapshot timing issue.
history.action: feature (backlog #5): end screen stats — fixed UpgradeChoiceModal to hide when game is over (added s.state !== 'running' guard). Added goldSpent tracking (units + towers). Updated GameOver component to show 'Mat brukt' instead of 'Mat samlet'. Updated HudState.stats interface with goldSpent field.

history.mode: passive + auto-upgrade (first card each wave, no manual towers/units)
history.notes: Third consecutive wave-4 loss. Passive play pattern: starter Stinger buys ~1-2 waves of defense, then base crumbles wave 4-5 without active tower investment. Upgrade RNG is highly variable — no HP-heal draw this run.
history.action: feature (backlog #6): active upgrades summary on end screen — added 'UPGRADES TATT' chip list to GameOver component. Each chip shows icon + name with rarity color (--rarity-tone CSS var). Uses existing HudState.activeUpgrades array. Verified visually: chips appear between stats grid and action buttons.

history.mode: passive + auto-upgrade (press 1 each wave, no manual towers/units)
history.notes: Fourth consecutive wave-4 loss. HP progression: 500→410 (w1) →260 (w2) →80 (w3) →0 (w4). The lone starter Stinger can't keep up with wave 4 (7 light units on Nord). Identified root cause: second tower placement at (400,620) missed Nord lane entirely (distance 265 > range 200). Corrected to (320,490) which covers both Nord+Midt from a closer position. Verified with test run: HP 500→470 (w1) →350 (w2) →170 (w3) →0 (w4, all enemies cleared). Clear improvement: less damage per wave, base died at wave 4 with ai=0 vs ai=4-5 before.
history.action: feature (backlog #7): second free starter Stinger tower at (320,490) in the Nord-Midt gap closer to base. Provides a second fire zone covering both Nord and Midt lanes. FREE_STARTER_TOWER renamed to FREE_STARTER_TOWERS array. GameScene iterates over array. Tower placement validated via isOnLaneOrArena check.

history.mode: passive + auto-upgrade (press 1 each wave, no manual towers/units)
history.notes: MAJOR improvement: survived to wave 7 (was wave 4 in runs 23-26). HP progression: 500 (w1-2) →470 (w3) →470 (w4) →350 (w5) →110 (w6) →0 (w7). Wave 4 now consistently survived thanks to 2nd starter tower. Bottleneck shifted to waves 5-7. Wave 5 (6 medium Midt) cost 120 HP, wave 6 (7 medium Nord) cost 240 HP, wave 7 (8 medium all lanes) killed base. Sør lane (opens wave 5) had zero coverage — wave 7 first wave to hit all 3 simultaneously.
history.action: feature (backlog #8): 3rd free starter Webber tower at (420,620) between Midt and Sør lanes. Webber slows enemies 50% for 1800ms, doubling the number of stinger shots on targets passing through. Positioned to cover early Midt path (wave 5) and Sør lane entrance (waves 7+). Config comment updated.

history.mode: passive + auto-upgrade (first card each wave, no manual towers/units)
history.notes: HP was full 500 through waves 1-4 (best yet). Died wave 6. Bad upgrade draw — all unit/combat upgrades, no HP heal, no tower buff. Regression from run 27 (wave 7) due to upgrade RNG, not tower coverage. 3 free towers (2 Stingers + 1 Webber) are sufficient for waves 1-4 with no damage. Bottleneck: waves 5-7 medium cliff combined with no healing upgrades. Wave 5 (medium Midt) and wave 6 (medium Nord) together drained all remaining HP.
history.action: balance (backlog #9): reduce wave 5 from 6→5 medium, wave 6 from 7→6 medium, wave 7 from 8→6 medium all-lanes. Smoother medium ramp reduces upgrade-luck dependency at the critical wave 5-7 cliff. The 8-soldier all-lanes jump was too steep for 3 towers regardless of upgrade draw.

history.mode: passive + auto-upgrade (first card each wave, no manual towers/units)
history.notes: Best passive run yet — survived waves 1-4 with zero damage, W5 -60 HP, W6 -240 HP, W7 -60 HP, died W8. Wave 8 is 9 heavy units entirely on Sør lane — only the Webber covers Sør (no Stinger there), so 9 heavies slip through. Gold 1732 unspent at death confirms active players are not being nudged to build towers. Rebalance from run 28 was effective: W7 (all-lanes medium) dropped from lethal to -60 HP.
history.action: feature (backlog #10): gold nudge UI in WaveStartMenu. When player has ≥300 mat during idle phase, a pulsing amber box appears between the wave preview and Start button: 'Du har X mat — bygg et tårn! [Q] [W] [E]'. Animates with a subtle glow pulse to draw the eye without being disruptive.

history.mode: passive + auto-upgrade (first card each wave, no manual towers/units)
history.notes: Died wave 5 (medium Midt). Regression from run 29 (wave 8) due to bad upgrade draw — first card was Eksplosjons-rom (offensive), no HP heal drawn. Wave 1 did 90 HP damage (vs. zero in runs 28-29) — consistent with high-variance upgrade-luck dependency. 932 gold unspent confirms passive players not spending on towers. Wave 8 Sør coverage (backlog #11) not reached this run, but root cause identified in run 29 confirmed: only a Webber covers Sør, insufficient to kill heavy units.
history.action: balance+feature (backlog #11): 4th free Stinger at (300,770) covering Sør-lane entrance. Validates against lane polygon (≈104px from Sør centerline, > 68px exclusion). Also reduced wave 8 from 9→7 heavy units on Sør as belt-and-suspenders. FREE_STARTER_TOWERS array now has 4 entries. Belt-and-suspenders: even with bad upgrade RNG, passive runs should now survive wave 8.

history.mode: passive + auto-upgrade (click first card each wave, no manual towers/units)
history.notes: Died wave 4. Regression from run 29 (wave 8) and run 30 (wave 5) due to bad upgrade draw — Maurganger+Maurkongen+Tårnsmed gave zero HP healing. Wave 1 did 120 HP damage (500→380), worse than the expected 0-90 range. High upgrade-RNG dependency confirmed: without HP-heal draw (Forsterket tue / Selvoppofring), base crumbles wave 4-5. Backlog #12 root cause validated — stinger range 200 not catching all Midt units before they deal damage.
history.action: balance (backlog #12): stinger range 200→220 to ensure earlier engagement on all lanes, reducing damage variance in early waves. Also wave 5 reduced 5→4 medium units (belt-and-suspenders) so wave 5 is survivable even without HP-heal upgrade draw. Goal: passive run baseline wave 5+ without luck dependency.

history.mode: passive + auto-upgrade (click first card each wave, no manual towers/units)
history.notes: Backlog #12 changes (stinger range 220 + wave 5 at 4 medium) were highly effective — pushed baseline from wave 4 to wave 8. HP map: W1-4 zero damage (500), W5 -90 (410), W6 -240 (170), W7 zero damage (170), W8 -170 (dead). Wave 6 is the new primary bottleneck: 6 medium all on Nord concentrates pressure on one lane, overwhelming the 2 Nord Stingers. Wave 7 (6 medium all-lanes = 2 per lane) did zero damage because single-lane stress is distributed. Wave 8 (7 heavy Sør) killed remaining 170 HP. Gold 2018 unspent — passive player still not building towers.
history.action: balance (backlog #13): wave 6 reduced 6→5 medium Nord (eliminates 240 HP spike), wave 8 reduced 7→6 heavy Sør (belt-and-suspenders on Sør kill capacity). Goal: passive baseline moves to wave 9+ so next bottleneck (wave 9: 10 medium all-lanes) can be measured.

history.mode: passive + auto-upgrade (click first card each wave, no manual towers/units)
history.notes: HP map: W1-4 null skade (500), W5 -60 (440), W6 -180 (260), W7 -180 (80), W8 drepte (0). Same wave config as run 33 but very different result — run 33 W5-7 did zero damage; this run they did 420 HP total. Cause: bad upgrade RNG (Selvoppofring + Eksplosjons-rom both useless in passive play — only trigger on player unit death). Confirms high upgrade-variance in waves 6-7. W6 (5 medium Nord) and W7 (6 medium all) are the bottleneck without tower-buff or HP-heal upgrades. W8 (5 heavy Sør): Spitter at (350,800) partially effective but base had only 80 HP entering wave 8. Gold 1724 unspent.
history.action: balance (backlog #15): wave 6 reduced 5→4 medium Nord, wave 7 reduced 6→5 medium all-lanes. Matches the pattern of 1-unit reductions used in backlog #9/#12/#13. Goal: passive baseline survives wave 7 even without HP-heal upgrades, enters wave 8 with ≥250 HP. Belt-and-suspenders: 5 free towers + reduced W6/W7 should handle the mid-game cliff without luck dependency.

history.mode: passive + auto-upgrade (click first card each wave, 3x speed from wave 2 onward)
history.notes: CAUTION: first run at 3x speed — may skew results. W2-3 light damage anomalously high (W2:150, W3:210) vs. all prior runs (0-30 HP). Cause unclear: possibly 3x speed affecting Webber slow+Stinger chain timing, or extreme bad RNG (all upgrades useless for passive play). Core findings: (1) died wave 7, confirming runs 33-34 pattern of W7-8 cliff with bad RNG. (2) W8 (5 heavy Sør) never reached — prior runs 33-34 showed it killed base in 1 wave. Goal from backlog #16: reduce W8 5→4 heavy Sør to lower Sør cliff. Future runs should use 1x speed for accurate baseline.
history.action: balance (backlog #16): wave 8 reduced 5→4 heavy Sør. Addresses the confirmed Sør-cliff: runs 33-34 both died at wave 8 even with 5 free towers. Reducing by 1 unit follows the established 1-unit-reduction pattern. Goal: passive baseline reaches wave 9 (10 medium all-lanes) with ≥100 HP.

history.mode: passive + auto-upgrade (click first card each wave, 1x speed)
history.notes: FIRST RUN TO REACH WAVE 9 — new milestone. HP map: W1-4 zero damage (500), W4→W5: −60 (440), W5 zero damage, W6 −180 (260), W7 zero damage, W8 −240 (20 HP barely survived!), died W9. W8 (3 heavy Sør) still deals 240 HP — leaves only 20 HP entering W9. All upgrades useless for passive play (no HP-heal, no tower-buff draw). Gold 2076 unspent. Backlog #18 goal (enter W9) achieved; goal of ≥200 HP at W9 start not yet met.
history.action: balance (backlog #19): wave 8 reduced 3→2 heavy Sør + wave 9 reduced 10→8 medium all-lanes. W8 still the cliff: 3 heavy dealt 240 HP leaving only 20 HP at W9. Goal: passive baseline enters W9 with ≥100 HP, and W9 (8 medium all-lanes) more survivable with 5 free towers.

history.mode: passive + auto-upgrade (click first card each wave, 1x speed)
history.notes: HP map: W1-4 zero damage (500), W5 -60 (440), W6 -120 (320), W7 zero damage (320), W8 -320 dead. Confirms W7 reductions from backlog #15 working (zero damage). W8 (4 heavy Sør) kills base from 320 HP with bad upgrade draw — neither Krigsdronning nor Termitt-koloni provide HP-heal or tower-buff in passive play. Upgrade-RNG dependency confirmed: passive baseline needs to survive W8 without luck. Sør tower pair (Stinger 300,770 + Spitter 350,800) insufficient against 4 heavy units without Webber slow chain confirming. Note: run 35 3x-speed anomaly not seen this run — W2-3 both at zero damage confirms 1x speed is reliable baseline.
history.action: balance (backlog #18): wave 8 reduced 4→3 heavy Sør. Established 1-unit-reduction pattern. Goal: passive baseline enters wave 9 (10 medium all-lanes) with ≥200 HP regardless of upgrade draw.

history.mode: passive + auto-upgrade (click first card each wave, 1x speed)
history.notes: W10 still the bottleneck after backlog #20 (9 heavy Midt). HP map: W1-5 zero damage (500), W6+W7 combined -120 HP (380 entering W8), W8 -120 HP (380→260), W9 -60 HP (260→200), W10 -200+ dead. W10 (9 heavy Midt) killed from 200 HP — single Midt Stinger cannot handle 9 concentrated heavies. Bad upgrade draw (all unit-combat, no HP-heal, no tower-buff). W8 variance noted: 0 HP in run 38 vs -120 HP this run — inconsistent coverage on Sør. Gold 2204 unspent.
history.action: balance (backlog #21): wave 10 reduced 9→7 heavy Midt. 2-unit reduction follows backlog #20 pattern. 9 heavy overwhelmed Midt coverage from 200 HP. Goal: passive baseline reaches W11 (12 heavy all-lanes) with ≥100 HP.

history.mode: passive + auto-upgrade (click first card each wave, 1x speed)
history.notes: BEST PASSIVE RUN: zero damage through waves 1-9 (HP 500 all the way). Entered W10 with full 500 HP. W10 (7 heavy Midt) killed from 500 HP — even full-health passive run cannot survive 7 concentrated heavies on Midt. 5 free towers insufficient for W10 regardless of upgrade draw. Gold high and unspent. Confirms W10 is hardcoded bottleneck independent of upgrade RNG.
history.action: balance (backlog #22): wave 10 reduced 7→5 heavy Midt. 2-unit reduction because 7 heavies killed from 500 HP (full health) — independent of upgrade luck. Goal: passive baseline reaches W11 (12 heavy all-lanes) with ≥200 HP.

history.mode: passive + auto-upgrade (click first card each wave, 1x speed)
history.notes: NEW MILESTONE: reached wave 10. HP map: W1-3 zero damage (500), W4 -60 (440), W5 Forsterket tue healed to 750, W6 -60 (690), W7 -60 (630), W8 ZERO (2 heavy Sør ✓ backlog #19), W9 ZERO (8 medium all ✓ backlog #19), W10 -630 dead. W10 (11 heavy Midt) overwhelmed Midt stingers killing from 630 HP. All upgrades combat-oriented/useless for passive play except Forsterket tue. Both backlog #19 reductions confirmed highly effective: W8+W9 both zero damage. Gold 2451 unspent.
history.action: balance (backlog #20): wave 10 reduced 11→9 heavy Midt. 2-unit reduction because 11 concentrated heavy on a single lane is a severe spike — killed 630 HP in one wave. Goal: passive baseline reaches W11 (12 heavy all-lanes) with ≥200 HP.

history.mode: passive + auto-upgrade (click first card each wave, no manual towers/units)
history.notes: HP map: W1-3 zero damage (500), W4 -30 (470), W5-7 zero damage (470), W8 -470 (dead). Backlog #13 changes confirmed highly effective — waves 5, 6, 7 all dealt zero damage. Wave 8 (6 heavy Sør) is now the sole bottleneck: only 1 Stinger + 1 Webber cover Sør. Six heavy units (250 HP each) overwhelm the lone Stinger even with Webber slow. 2104 gold unspent — passive players still not building. The Sør coverage gap requires a splash tower (Spitter) to handle clustered heavies.
history.action: feature+balance (backlog #14): 5th free Spitter at (350,800) covering Sør lane with 60px splash AoE against clustered heavy units (bølge 8+). Also reduced wave 8 from 6→5 heavy as belt-and-suspenders. FREE_STARTER_TOWERS now has 5 entries. Goal: passive baseline reaches wave 9 (10 medium all-lanes).

backlog.title: Auto-place starter tower — place 1 free Stinger tower near base at game start to help new players understand tower placement
Wave preview arrows — show lane indicators before wave starts so player knows which lanes will be hit
Tower sell button — right-click a placed tower to refund 50% of cost
Boss visual indicator — special spawn animation + warning banner for boss waves (wave 15)
End screen stats — show waves cleared, towers built, total kills, gold spent on win/loss screen
Active upgrades summary on end screen — list which upgrades were taken so player can review their build after death
Second tower slot — give player a second free tower placement to cover more lanes in passive runs, reducing wave-4-5 cliff

Wave 4 survival — passive play still dies at wave 4 despite 2 towers. Either reduce wave 4 soldiers (7→5) or increase base HP (500→600), or add a Webber slowtower as 3rd free tower to help stingers kill faster
Wave 5-7 medium cliff — smoother ramp needed: 5→6→5 soldiers (was 6→7→8) for medium waves. Passive play dies wave 6-7 due to steep jump when all-lanes wave hits simultaneously.
Active play enablement — passive runs end with 1000+ gold unspent. Consider a gold-nudge UI or tutorial prompt when player has >300 gold and wave is about to start, encouraging tower building.

Wave 8 Sør coverage — wave 8 is 9 heavy units all on Sør lane, but only a Webber covers Sør (no Stinger). Either add a 4th starter Stinger near Sør or reduce wave 8 soldiers (9→7). Currently the hard wall for passive runs.

Wave 5 damage variance — passive runs take 0–90 HP in wave 1 (4 light Midt) and die at wave 5 without HP-heal upgrade. High upgrade-RNG dependency. Consider increasing stinger range 200→220 to ensure Midt units are consistently caught, or reduce wave 5 from 5→4 medium. Goal: wave 5 survivable without HP-heal draw.

Wave 6-7 survival — with stinger range 220 and wave 5 at 4 medium, passive runs should survive to wave 6+. Next bottleneck: wave 6 (6 medium Nord) + wave 7 (6 medium all-lanes). Monitor if passive baseline moves from wave 4 to wave 6-7 range. If still dying at wave 5, consider reducing wave 6 or adding a Spitter tower as 5th free starter.
Wave 8 Sør heavy cliff — 6 heavy Sør overwhelms 1 Stinger + 1 Webber. Added 5th free Spitter at (350,800) for splash AoE + reduced wave 8 6→5 heavy.

Wave 6-7 mid-game cliff — W6 (5 medium Nord) and W7 (6 medium all) caused -360 HP total in run 34 with bad upgrades. Reduced W6 5→4 and W7 6→5 to smooth ramp. Goal: passive baseline survives wave 7 with ≥250 HP regardless of upgrade draw.

Wave 8-9 survival — with W6/W7 reductions, passive baseline should enter wave 8 with ≥250 HP. Monitor if 5 free towers (2 Stinger Nord, Webber Midt/Sør, Stinger Sør, Spitter Sør) handle wave 8 (5 heavy Sør) and wave 9 (10 medium all-lanes = ~3-4 per lane). If still dying at wave 8, consider reducing W8 to 4 heavy or repositioning Spitter. If wave 9 is new bottleneck, reduce 10→8 medium or add 6th free tower.

Wave 9 survival — W8 reduced to 4 heavy Sør. Monitor if passive baseline reaches wave 9 (10 medium all-lanes). If 10 medium all-lanes (~3-4 per lane) kills base, reduce to 8 or add 6th free tower (Stinger/Spitter) on Midt. Also investigate anomalous early-wave damage seen in run 35 (3x speed): run future tests at 1x speed to confirm W2-3 are still handled by 5 towers with 0 damage.

Wave 8 Sør cliff (again) — run 36 with 4 heavy Sør killed base from 320 HP with bad upgrade draw (Krigsdronning+Termitt-koloni). W8 reduced 4→3 heavy Sør. Follows established 1-unit-reduction pattern. Goal: passive baseline enters wave 9 with ≥200 HP regardless of upgrade RNG.

Wave 8-9 cliff — run 37 first to reach W9 but only 20 HP entering it. W8 (3 heavy) dealt 240 HP; W9 (10 medium all-lanes) immediately killed. W8 reduced 3→2 heavy Sør + W9 reduced 10→8 medium all-lanes. Goal: passive baseline enters W9 with ≥100 HP and W9 survivable with 5 free towers even with bad upgrade RNG.

Wave 10 bottleneck — run 38 reached W10 with 630 HP but 11 heavy Midt killed base in one wave. W8 (2 heavy Sør) and W9 (8 medium all) both dealt zero damage confirming backlog #19 effective. W10 reduced 11→9 heavy Midt. Goal: passive baseline reaches W11 (12 heavy all-lanes) with ≥200 HP.

Wave 10 still lethal at 9 heavy Midt — run 39 entered W10 with only 200 HP and died (all-unit-combat upgrade draw, no HP-heal). W10 reduced 9→7 heavy Midt. Goal: passive baseline reaches W11 (12 heavy all-lanes) with ≥100 HP even without HP-heal upgrades.

Wave 10 still lethal at 7 heavy Midt — run 40 entered W10 with 500 HP (full health!) and still died. 5 free towers cannot handle 7 concentrated heavies on Midt lane. W10 reduced 7→5 heavy Midt. Goal: passive baseline reaches W11 (12 heavy all-lanes) with ≥200 HP.

Wave 11 bottleneck — run 41 reached W11 with 380 HP (new milestone!) but 12 heavy all-lanes killed base completely. 4 heavy per lane overwhelms 5 free towers. W11 reduced 12→9 heavy all-lanes (1 unit per lane reduction). Goal: passive baseline reaches W12 (14 heavy all-lanes) with ≥200 HP.

Wave 10 still lethal at 5 heavy Midt — run 42 entered W10 with 630 HP (lucky heal) but took 480 HP damage (vs 120 HP in run 41 — extreme variance). Without heal upgrade, passive runs die at W10 consistently. W10 reduced 5→3 heavy Midt (2-unit reduction). Goal: passive baseline enters W11 (9 heavy all-lanes) with ≥200 HP regardless of upgrade draw.

Wave 11 bottleneck at 9 heavy all-lanes — run 43 entered W11 with exactly 200 HP (backlog #24 goal achieved) but 9 heavy all-lanes (3 per lane) killed base completely. Also killed 380 HP in run 41. W11 reduced 9→6 heavy all-lanes (1 per lane reduction). Goal: passive baseline reaches W12 (14 heavy all-lanes) with ≥200 HP.

Wave 11 still lethal at 6 heavy all-lanes — run 44 entered W11 with 210 HP (goal met) but 6 heavy all-lanes (2 per lane) killed base completely (210 HP in one wave). W9 also showed high variance (0-180 HP: 0 in run 43, 180 in run 44). W11 reduced 6→3 heavy all-lanes (1 per lane). W9 reduced 8→6 medium all-lanes. Goal: passive baseline reaches W12 (14 heavy all-lanes) with ≥200 HP.

Wave 12 bottleneck at 14 heavy all-lanes — run 45 entered W12 with 690 HP (huge surplus from backlog #26) but 14 heavy all-lanes (~5 per lane) dealt 480 HP (690→210). Entered W13 with 210 HP but killed immediately (16 heavy all-lanes). W12 reduced 14→11 heavy all-lanes (1 per lane reduction). Severe jump from W11 (3 heavy) to W12 (14 heavy) needs smoothing. Goal: passive baseline reaches W13 (16 heavy all-lanes) with ≥200 HP.

Wave 7 cascade issue — run 46 (no heal upgrade) died at W9: W7 (5 medium all) dealt 180 HP → cascaded into W8 (-120 HP) → entered W9 with only 200 HP (killed). W7 reduced 5→4 medium all-lanes. Backlog #27 (W12: 11 heavy) unvalidated due to early death. Goal: passive baseline survives W7-W9 without heal upgrade, enters W10 with ≥200 HP so W12 validation can happen.

Wave 12 bottleneck at 11 heavy all-lanes — run 47 confirmed backlog #28 (W7 zero damage) but W12 (11 heavy all-lanes) killed from 260 HP worst-case entry (no heal: 500 - 120 W8 - 120 W10 = 260 HP). W12 reduced 11→8 heavy all-lanes (1 per lane reduction). Goal: passive baseline enters W13 (16 heavy all-lanes) with ≥100 HP.

Wave 12 still lethal at 8 heavy all-lanes — run 48 confirmed worst-case entry at 260 HP (500 - 60 W4 - 120 W6 - 60 W9). W12 (8 heavy all-lanes ≈ 2-3 per lane) killed from 260 HP with all-bad upgrade draw. W12 reduced 8→5 heavy all-lanes (1 per lane reduction). Goal: passive baseline enters W13 (16 heavy all-lanes) with ≥100 HP.

Wave 8 Sør high variance — run 49 showed W8 (2 heavy Sør) dealing 120 HP (vs 0 HP in runs 47-48). Combined with W6 (-120 HP), the cascade W6+W8=-240 HP leaves only 200 HP entering W10, which is lethal (3 heavy Midt). W8 reduced 2→1 heavy Sør. Goal: passive baseline enters W9 consistently with ≥300 HP so W12 (5 heavy all-lanes) can be validated without W8 cascades.

Wave 13 new bottleneck — run 50 (NEW RECORD: first to reach W13) died from 150 HP. W12 (5 heavy all-lanes) dealt 360 HP in run 50. W13 (16 heavy all-lanes) killed from 150 HP immediately. W13 reduced 16→13 heavy all-lanes (1 per lane reduction). Goal: passive baseline (with Forsterket tue heal) enters W14 (18 heavy all-lanes) with ≥100 HP.

Wave 13 still lethal at 13 heavy all-lanes — run 51 entered W13 with 510 HP (far better entry than run 50's 150 HP) but 13 heavy all-lanes killed base completely. W13 reduced 13→10 heavy all-lanes (1 per lane reduction). High W12 variance noted: 120 HP in run 51 vs 360 HP in run 50 for same 5 heavy config. Goal: passive baseline (with Forsterket tue heal) enters W14 (18 heavy all-lanes) with ≥100 HP.

Wave 10 extreme variance — run 52 (no heal upgrade) entered W10 with 320 HP but W10 (3 heavy Midt) dealt 240 HP, leaving only 80 HP for W11. W10 variance range: 60-240 HP for same 3 heavy config. W10 reduced 3→2 heavy Midt. Goal: passive baseline WITHOUT heal upgrade survives W10-W11 and enters W12 (5 heavy all-lanes) with ≥200 HP so W13 (10 heavy, backlog #33 change) can be validated.

Wave 11 bottleneck at 3 heavy all-lanes — run 53 (no heal) entered W11 with 290 HP but 3 heavy all-lanes (1/lane round-robin) dealt 240 HP (80 HP/heavy avg = ~2 base attacks each before towers finish). W11 reduced 3→2 heavy all-lanes. Goal: passive baseline WITHOUT heal enters W12 (5 heavy all-lanes) with ≥150 HP.

Wave 13 bottleneck at 10 heavy all-lanes — run 54 (no heal, BEST run yet) entered W13 with 380 HP (500 - 120 W12) but 10 heavy all-lanes killed from 380 HP (~38 HP/heavy). W13 reduced 10→7 heavy all-lanes (1 per lane reduction). Goal: passive baseline WITHOUT heal enters W14 (18 heavy all-lanes) with ≥100 HP.

Wave 12 extreme variance — run 55 (no heal) entered W12 with 410 HP but W12 (5 heavy all-lanes) dealt 240 HP (vs 120 HP in run 54 — 2× variance). Only 170 HP entered W13 (7 heavy all-lanes, backlog #36 reduction). W13 killed from 170 HP (3 heavies reached base, ~57 HP/heavy). Root cause: W12 worst-case 240 HP makes backlog #36's W13=7 heavy calibration break down. W12 reduced 5→4 heavy all-lanes. Goal: W12 worst-case drops to ~180 HP, ensuring passive baseline (without heal, with up to 90 HP early damage) enters W13 with ≥230 HP so W13 (7 heavy) can be properly evaluated.

Wave 13 still lethal at 7 heavy all-lanes — run 56 (heal draw) entered W13 with 360 HP but all 7 heavies cleared base (~51 HP/heavy × 7 = 357 HP). W12 (4 heavy) validated at 120 HP damage this run. W13 reduced 7→4 heavy all-lanes (1 per lane reduction). Goal: passive baseline (with Forsterket tue heal) enters W14 (18 heavy all-lanes) with ≥100 HP.

Wave 14 bottleneck at 18 heavy all-lanes — run 57 (heal draw) entered W14 with 390 HP (backlog #38 goal met) but 18 heavy all-lanes killed base from 390 HP (6 reached base ≈65 HP/heavy, 12 still alive). W13 (4 heavy) confirmed zero damage. W12 high variance: 120 HP (run 56) vs 240 HP (run 57) for same 4-heavy config. W14 reduced 18→15 heavy all-lanes (1 per lane reduction). Goal: passive baseline (with Forsterket tue heal) enters W15 (20 heavy all-lanes boss) with ≥100 HP.

Wave 13 extreme variance at 4 heavy all-lanes — run 58 (heal after W10) entered W13 with 390 HP (same as run 57) but W13 dealt 240 HP (vs 0 HP in run 57 — same config, same entry HP). Combined W12+W13 damage: 600 HP from 750 HP base, leaving only 150 HP for W14. W14 (15 heavy) killed from 150 HP (13 soldiers still alive, ~75 HP/heavy). W13 reduced 4→3 heavy all-lanes (1 per lane reduction). Goal: passive baseline (with Forsterket tue heal) enters W14 (15 heavy all-lanes) with ≥300 HP so W14 leaves ≥100 HP entering W15.

Wave 14 still lethal at 15 heavy all-lanes — run 59 (heal draw) entered W14 with 510 HP (backlog #40 goal met) but 15 heavy killed base completely (6 reached base ≈85 HP/heavy, 9 still alive). W12+W13 both zero damage this run (very favorable). W14 reduced 15→12 heavy all-lanes (1 per lane reduction). Goal: passive baseline (with Forsterket tue heal) enters W15 (20 heavy boss) with ≥100 HP.

Wave 14 still lethal at 12 heavy all-lanes — run 60 (no-heal worst case) entered W14 with 320 HP, died (8/12 alive, ~4 cleared base ≈80 HP/heavy). Consistent with run 59 (~85 HP/heavy). W14 reduced 12→9 heavy all-lanes (1 per lane reduction). Expected with-heal entry ~570–630 HP; with 9 heavy ~3 reach base (~240 HP damage) → enter W15 with ≥200 HP. Goal: passive baseline (with Forsterket tue heal) enters W15 (20 heavy boss) with ≥200 HP so W15 boss mechanics can be tested.
